english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد
english translation text: O Allah send Your blessings on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
Glory be to He whose Arsh is in the heavens!
Glory be to He whose Will operates in the earth!
Glory be to He who examines (the dead) in the graves!
Glory be to He who surfaced a path over the ocean!
Glory be to He who has the total control over the Fire!
Glory be to He who surrounds the Paradise with (His) mercy!
Glory be to He who will do justice on the Day of Judgment!
Glory be to He who raised the sky!
Glory be to He who spread the earth!

arabic text: سُبْحانَ الَّذى لا مَلْجَاَ وَلا مَنْجا مِنْهُ اِلاّ اِلَيْهِ
english translation text: Glory be to He from whom there is no running away unless (one takes refuge) with Him!

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد
english translation text: O Allah send Your blessings on Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
